updateTicker: New arrivals landing weekly across whiskey, tequila, and RTDs
Watch for tasting nights and featured bottle drops
Cold beer wall ready for game day, house parties, and late runs
North College pickup with wine, mixers, snacks, and party staples
Follow Bullfrog Wine & Spirits on Instagram for fresh arrivals and store events

premiumShelf.name: Michter's 10 Year
premiumShelf.note: A single barrel Kentucky straight bourbon aged ten years to perfection. Rare finds don't wait.

premiumShelf.name: Weller lineup
premiumShelf.note: Rare, exclusive, and unapologetic. The wheated bourbon lineup shoppers watch for all year.

premiumShelf.name: Willett Family Estate
premiumShelf.note: A 128.6 proof Kentucky bourbon in limited allocation. Get it while you can.

premiumShelf.name: Eagle Rare 12 Year
premiumShelf.note: Exclusive, rare, and unforgettable, with toffee and toasted oak over a long, elegant finish.

premiumShelf.name: Patron El Alto
premiumShelf.note: Discover artistry with a world of rare agave from the store's curated premium selection.

premiumShelf.name: WhistlePig PiggyBank Rye
premiumShelf.note: A collectible, bold, and iconic premium rye in a one-of-a-kind pig decanter.

updateMoments.title: Tastings and store events
updateMoments.body: Watch for upcoming tastings, special pours, and featured in-store events.

updateMoments.title: Featured bottles and fresh arrivals
updateMoments.body: New releases, standout local picks, and limited bottles will be highlighted here first.

updateMoments.title: More updates soon
updateMoments.body: Store news, seasonal picks, and helpful links will be shared as new updates go live.

featuredUpdates.title: Old Fitzgerald Bottled-in-Bond is on the way.
featuredUpdates.body: A 100 proof, 7 year bottled-in-bond wheated bourbon with serious collector appeal is landing soon.
featuredUpdates.cta: Follow Instagram for availability and same-day shelf updates

featuredUpdates.title: Chartreuse Green is in stock.
featuredUpdates.body: Limited availability and highly allocated, this legendary French herbal liqueur is perfect for collectors and cocktail lovers.
featuredUpdates.cta: Ask in store while supplies last

featuredUpdates.title: Big flavor, big savings: the Manhattan bundle.
featuredUpdates.body: Lot 40 Canadian rye and Luxardo maraschino cherries together for the ultimate Manhattan, bundled to save you $10.

tastingUpdates.title: This calls for margs.
tastingUpdates.body: Premium spirits, mixers, and margarita essentials pulled together in one display so you can stock up for world-class margaritas at home.
tastingUpdates.alt: Margarita display inside Bullfrog Wine & Spirits

tastingUpdates.title: Official supporter of the FIFA World Cup 2026 with Casamigos.
tastingUpdates.body: Great tequila and real friends: a World Cup feature that keeps game weekends stocked with blancos, reposados, and margarita picks.
tastingUpdates.alt: Casamigos FIFA World Cup 2026 promotional graphic for Bullfrog Wine & Spirits

tastingUpdates.title: Ready when you are: canned cocktails, chilled and stocked.
tastingUpdates.body: Margaritas, martinis, white russians, and old fashioneds in ready-to-pour cans. Just open, pour, and enjoy at home or on the go.
tastingUpdates.alt: Ready-to-drink canned cocktails promotional graphic for Bullfrog Wine & Spirits

tastingUpdates.title: Star Hill Farm puts nature as the maker.
tastingUpdates.body: Locally grown, thoughtfully crafted American wheat whisky that showcases the influence of the land and small-batch craft.
tastingUpdates.alt: Star Hill Farm wheat whisky promotional graphic for Bullfrog Wine & Spirits

tastingUpdates.title: Blade and Bow: bold by name, remarkable by nature.
tastingUpdates.body: A Kentucky straight bourbon crafted with precision, delivering a smooth, rich experience with deep character and a lasting finish.
tastingUpdates.alt: Blade and Bow bourbon promotional graphic for Bullfrog Wine & Spirits

tastingUpdates.title: Summer displays keep the store feeling active.
tastingUpdates.body: Seasonal setups and themed displays bring extra energy to weekend shopping and in-store promotions.
tastingUpdates.alt: Bullfrog Wine & Spirits summer storefront display
